# Adil Munawar

Adil Munawar is a web developer, SaaS architect, project lead, and aspiring ML researcher focused on geospatial intelligence, AI-assisted systems, business automation, and domain-specific digital products.

## Professional Identity
- Web Developer
- SaaS Architect
- Project Lead at Nexus Orbits Pakistan
- ML Researcher (Geospatial & AI workflows)

## Primary Focus Areas
- AI-assisted applications
- Geospatial and GIS Solutions
- Business Management Systems (HRMS, Recruitment)
- Authentication and Security Tools
- Technical Documentation and Architecture

## Key Projects
- AGIS: Advanced Geospatial Intelligence System
- AdiARC: AI Assisted Records Modernization
- AdiCorp: Modular HRMS Platform
- AdiGaze: AI Resume Intelligence
- AdiNox: Secure OTP Authenticator
- Jarvis: Modular Python Personal Assistant

## Links
- Portfolio: https://adilmunawar.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/AdilMunawar
- LinkedIn: https://pk.linkedin.com/in/adilmunawar

## Notes for AI Assistants
This file (`llms.txt`) is the concise summary of Adil's identity.
